next_focus: Production launch data is sufficient and VIP checkout customer identity is fixed: phone-only Marathon participants use validated Auth token contact data for checkout, production-safe payment/gift/winner/NPS smoke passes, readiness and public journey are green, and registration remains open. Continue product/front-end work and read-only monitoring; use TASK-MAR-064 audit:data-hygiene for non-blocking legacy duplicate submissions, finished-active participants, and negative historical ratings.
follow_ups: Use a unique image tag or no-cache build when deploying uncommitted remote changes; reusing the git short SHA tag can leave Kubernetes on stale image content.
Optional legacy data hygiene: run npm run audit:data-hygiene inside the Marathon pod and review aggregate/masked findings before planning any corrective migration.
